fresh_facts.claim: Operation Epic Fury was launched on February 29, 2026, with more than 1,000 targets struck in the first 24 hours.
Two carrier strike groups (USS Gerald R. Ford and USS Abraham Lincoln) were operating in the region as of early March 2026, with a third carrier (USS George H.W. Bush) preparing deployment.
Four Americans were confirmed killed when an Iranian missile penetrated US air defenses and hit a fortified tactical operations center.
Qatar, the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Jordan, and Saudi Arabia were operating air defense systems alongside US systems to intercept Iranian missiles and drones.
Mojtaba Khamenei was appointed as Supreme Leader by the Assembly of Experts around March 12-13, 2026.
Israeli strikes on March 3 targeted the Assembly of Experts with the stated goal of disrupting the succession process.
US President Trump rejected Mojtaba Khamenei as successor on March 5, 2026.

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian outlined three non-negotiable 'red lines' for peace: formal recognition of Iran's sovereign rights, financial reparations for damages, and international security guarantees against future attacks.
Mojtaba Khamenei vowed in his first statement as Supreme Leader to continue blocking the Strait of Hormuz, threaten US bases, and avenge 'martyrs'.
The NCRI and Maryam Rajavi criticized the appointment of Mojtaba Khamenei as Supreme Leader on March 8, 2026, calling it a dynastic shift revealing clerical crisis.
US intelligence assessed that the Iranian government is structurally intact and not at risk of near-term collapse despite ongoing military operations.
The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has tightened control following bombings and threatened to crush unrest.
Iran's Strait of Hormuz blockade has disrupted global energy markets and transport as of March 12, 2026.
US President Trump stated on March 12-13 that rising oil prices benefit the US.
Dissidents argue that only internal uprisings, not bombings, can topple the Iranian regime, according to NCRI statement on March 11.
US-Israeli strikes continue targeting internal security sites in Iran as of March 12, 2026.
fresh_facts.source: Institute for the Study of War

regime_fall.current_status: Operation Epic Fury has sustained over 1,000 initial strikes on February 29 with continued targeting of internal security sites through March 12, supported by two operational and one preparing carrier strike group alongside regional air defense integration. Mojtaba Khamenei's appointment as Supreme Leader on March 12-13 demonstrates regime succession capacity despite military pressure, while defiant rhetoric on Strait blockade and regional threats persists despite US intelligence assessing structural stability remains intact.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Mojtaba Khamenei appointed as Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts on March 12-13, 2026, vowing to continue Strait of Hormuz blockade and regional resistance despite military campaign.
